sleepTargets.label: Nap 1
sleepTargets.notes: This nap usually stays longest while the second nap starts to wobble.

sleepTargets.label: Nap 2 / quiet time
sleepTargets.notes: Use quiet time or a short catnap if your child is not ready for a full one-nap day.

sleepTargets.label: Bedtime
sleepTargets.notes: On one-nap days, bedtime may need to move earlier.

feedTargets.label: Breakfast milk/solids
feedTargets.notes: Keep breakfast anchored close to wake-up.

feedTargets.label: Lunch
feedTargets.notes: A reliable lunch can make the afternoon more predictable.

feedTargets.label: Afternoon snack
feedTargets.notes: Use a snack to bridge to dinner without pushing dinner too late.

feedTargets.label: Bedtime milk
feedTargets.notes: A bedtime milk feed can stay as a calming anchor.

notes: Here's Somni's customised baseline plan to help {{babyName}} start sleeping better. Somni will adjust it as we learn more and as your baby grows and develops.
